title: FactoryLM CLF Deterministic Rule Candidate v1
description: A candidate deterministic validator mined from repeated reviewed corrections. proposal_class is FIXED to deterministic_rule_approval so it is never blurred with relationship or gold-answer proposals (requirement 9). A candidate is eligible only when it recurs across >=3 distinct document_lineage_keys, is expressible/testable deterministically, and a human approves it.

originating_cases.description: >=3 DISTINCT document_lineage_keys (not 3 pages of one manual). Enforced by the miner.

evidence_pattern.description: the structurally-similar evidence the rule keys on

deterministic_expression.description: how the rule is expressed as a testable check in printsense.grade_case

rollback_path.description: how to disable/revert the rule if it regresses
